title: Sales Director
description:
Opportunity

We are seeking an accomplished Sales Director to lead our commercial strategy and drive sustainable revenue growth across our logistics and supply chain portfolio. This is a senior leadership role responsible for building high-value customer relationships, securing long-term contracts, and guiding the sales organization to achieve ambitious growth targets.

Key Responsibilities

  •  Define and execute the company’s sales and commercial strategy in line with business objectives
  • Lead, mentor, and develop the sales and business development teams
  •  Own overall revenue targets, sales forecasting, and pipeline management
  •  Drive acquisition of strategic and enterprise customers through RFQs, tenders, and long sales cycles
  •  Build and maintain executive-level relationships with key customers and partners
  •  Oversee pricing strategy, contract negotiations, and commercial governance
  •  Work closely with operations, solutions design, finance, and senior leadership to deliver integrated logistics solutions
  •  Manage key strategic accounts and support major customer negotiations
  •  Monitor market trends, competitor activity, and emerging opportunities
  •  Represent the company at executive forums, customer meetings, and industry events

Qualifications & Experience

  •  Bachelor’s degree in Business, Logistics, Supply Chain, or a related field (MBA preferred)
  •  10+ years of progressive sales experience within: 3PL, 4PL, LLP, or complex logistics environments
  •  Proven leadership experience managing senior sales teams and large customer portfolios
  •  Strong track record in securing high-value contracts and multi-year logistics agreements
  •  Extensive experience handling complex RFQs, tenders, and enterprise negotiations
  •  Deep understanding of logistics, freight forwarding, and supply chain commercial models
  •  Strong strategic, analytical, and executive-level communication skills
  •  Results-driven leader with a hands-on and collaborative approach

Why Join Us?

  •  Executive leadership role with direct influence on company growth and strategy
  •  Opportunity to shape and scale the commercial organization
  •  Exposure to enterprise customers and complex global supply chains
  •  Competitive executive compensation and performance-based incentives
  •  Collaborative leadership culture with long-term growth vision
  •  Platform to build market presence and long-term value
